text:
Yoga is caused. Mars is a Yoga-
karaka for this Lagna and the Moon, Lagnadhipathi
(ascendant lord). The situation of the Moon in the 3rd and
Mars in the 9th is also good. The yoga gains some strength
as a result of which the native is financially sound. The
Dhanakaraka is in the 8th and this disposition is rather
adverse.
Chart No. 47 is another typical illustration of
Chandramangala Yoga.
The Moon-Mars combination has taken place in
Scorpio the 9th from Lagna. Mars is in his own house and
the Moon in debilitation. Because the Moon is waxing and
Mars occupies his own sign, this yoga has received some
vitality. The Dasa of Mars has been much

Concerning the Second House 107
better than the Moon's on account of the favourable
disposition of Mars.
Chart No. 47.—Born on 24-8-1890 at 8-44 p.m. (L.T.)
Lot. 12° 20' N.. Long. 76" 38' E.
Balance of Mercury Dasa at birth : Years 5-10-25.
The Second House.—In Chart No. 48, Virgo is the 2nd
house.
